title: EllipseMajorDiam Property
description: Specifies length of the major axis of the ellipse which is the inspection base line of ArcInspector.
notes:
EllipseMajorDiam is used to specify length of the ellipse's major axis when the ellipse is specified as a base line used by ArcInspector.

See Also: EllipseMajorDiam Property
